justification: JEC Senate.gov press release explicitly names Don Beyer as elected Vice Chair of the Joint Economic Committee.
Beyer's official House.gov news page is titled 'AI Caucus Co-Chair Beyer Response To Trump's AI Order', directly confirming his co-chair role in the Congressional Artificial Intelligence Caucus.
Beyer's official House.gov press release titled 'Beyer Appointed To Bipartisan Task Force On Artificial Intelligence' directly names him as a member of the task force.
Eshoo's official House.gov press release is issued as a Congressional AI Caucus co-chair, directly documenting her co-chair role.
Obernolte's official House.gov press release on the launch of the bipartisan AI Task Force names him as chairman alongside co-chair Ted Lieu.
Obernolte's official committees and caucuses page on House.gov lists his vice-chair role in the Congressional AI Caucus.
Obernolte's official biography on House.gov states he holds a Master of Science in Artificial Intelligence from UCLA, confirming the alumnus relationship.
The 'IV. The Project' chapter of the Situational Awareness essay on situational-awareness.ai directly quotes and mentions Sam Altman in the context of AGI.
BIDS's own About page states it is an integral part of UC Berkeley's College of Computing, Data Science, and Society (CDSS), directly documenting the parent_company relationship.
ServiceNow's official press release announces the agreement to acquire Element AI, directly naming both parties.
McGill University's official CIM page confirms the Centre for Intelligent Machines is a research centre within McGill, listing it under the Faculty of Engineering.
McGill's CDSI page for McCAIS explicitly describes it as a strategic initiative of the Computational and Data Systems Institute at McGill University.
The McGill AI Lab's own website describes itself as a student lab at McGill University focusing on frontier AI research, confirming the parent university relationship.

Springer journal article on NET-VISA as a Bayesian inference system deployed in CTBTO's International Data Centre bulletin production, documenting both Bayesian Logic's system and its CTBTO deployment.
Clarifai's official press release explicitly names both Clarifai and BAIR Lab and announces Clarifai's membership in the BAIR Open Research Commons.
